name: Open Budget Revenue - Current Year Totals
description: This dataset provides our current fiscal year's revenue budget and a transparent look at how we allocate public funds. There is also a total at the bottom of the dataset. Datasets will update every Friday by 11 p.m. (CST).

name: City of College Station Outstanding Debt Obligations (Tax backed and Business Debt)
Permits - Master Dataset
description: All issued permits by the City of College Station since 1989.

name: City of College Station - Business Type Debt Obligations
Open Checkbook - Master Dataset
description: Browse payment information by department, vendor or expenditure type. Datasets will update every Friday by 11 p.m. (CST).

name: Vendors - Master Dataset
description: Vendors tied to the Open Checkbook Master Dataset who have been paid by the City of College Station.

name: Permit Inspections - Master Dataset
description: All Permit Inspections performed by the City of College Station since 2010.

name: Open Budget Expenditures - Master Dataset
description: This site provides a guided view through our budget and provides a transparent look at how we allocate public funds. Datasets will update every Friday by 11 p.m. (CST).

description: Conducted by National Service Research. Participants rated various city services, quality of life issues, community characteristics, and project priorities.
